name: Devaney Hairs & Cantor Bouquets
description: Devaney hairs: arcs in Julia sets of transcendental entire functions (e.g. exponential E_a(z)=a·exp(z), 0<a<1/e). A hair is a simple curve from a finite endpoint to infinity; iterates preserve this structure. Cantor bouquet: Julia set of such exponentials; uncountably many hairs; homeomorphic to a straight brush. When attracting cycle has period > 1, hairs can pinch; kneading invariant determines connectivity. Devaney pioneered the study of these structures.
mermaid:
graph TD
    Julia["Julia and Fatou sets"]
    DefExp["Def: Exponential map E_a(z) = a·exp(z)"]
    DefTrans["Def: Transcendental entire\nEssential singularity at infinity"]
    DefHair["Def: Devaney hair\nArc: endpoint to infinity, f-invariant"]
    DefBouquet["Def: Cantor bouquet\nUncountably many hairs"]
    ThmStruct["Thm: J(E_a) Cantor bouquet\nFor 0 less than a less than 1/e"]
    DefBrush["Def: Straight brush\nTopological model for bouquet"]
    ThmHomeo["Thm: J ambiently homeo to straight brush"]
    LemKnead["Lem: Kneading invariant\nDetermines pinched hairs when period greater than 1"]
    Julia --> DefExp
    DefExp --> DefTrans
    DefTrans --> DefHair
    DefHair --> DefBouquet
    DefBouquet --> ThmStruct
    ThmStruct --> DefBrush
    DefBrush --> ThmHomeo
    ThmStruct --> LemKnead

    class DefExp,DefTrans,DefHair,DefBouquet,DefBrush definition
